name: Patrick Bet-David
title: Entrepreneur, Author & Media Personality
bio: Iranian-born American businessman, conservative media personality, author, and podcaster. He is the host of the PBD Podcast and Valuetainment, a YouTube channel with over 6 million subscribers. Born to an Assyrian father and Armenian mother in Tehran, his family fled Iran as refugees during the Iran-Iraq War, spending time in a German refugee camp before settling in the United States. He founded PHP Agency, a financial services company.
faith: Raised in a Christian family (Assyrian and Armenian heritage), Bet-David is an outspoken Christian who frequently discusses faith, God, and biblical principles on his Valuetainment platform. He has spoken about how his refugee experience and faith in God shaped his entrepreneurial drive and worldview.
